title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: Tutorial on building a real-world multi-agent AI travel planning system using LangGraph with four specialized agents (flight, hotel, itinerary, response). The system integrates Llama 3.3 70B via Groq, PostgreSQL for memory, and external APIs including AviationStack and Tavily Search.
